zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecelia de Mohaut於1197年出生在英國英格蘭爾莫利頓時，她的父親Roger de Mohaut19歲，母親Nichole de Rising23歲。她於1217年與Thurston de Banastre在英國藍卡爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1218年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年21歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecelia de Mohaut于1197年出生在英国英格兰爾莫利頓时，她的父亲Roger de Mohaut19岁，母亲Nichole de Rising23岁。她于1217年与Thurston de Banastre在英国藍卡爾牛頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1218年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cecelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecelia de Mohaut was born in 1197, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Mohaut, was 19 and her mother, Nichole de Rising, was 23. She married Thurston de Banastre in 1217, in Newton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1218, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecelia de Mohaut est née en 1197, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Mohaut, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Nichole de Rising, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thurston de Banastre en 1217, à Newton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1218, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecelia de Mohaut 1197 in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Mohaut 19 und ihre Mutter Nichole de Rising 23. Sie hat 1217 in Newton, Lancashire, England Thurston de Banastre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1218 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecelia de Mohaut è nata il nel 1197 nel Mollington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger de Mohaut, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Nichole de Rising, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thurston de Banastre nel 1217, nel Newton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1218, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecelia de Mohautが1197年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンで生まれた時，父Roger de Mohautは19歳，母Nichole de Risingは23歳であった。1217年にイギリスランカシュアイアニュートンでThurston de Banastreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1218年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで21歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecelia de Mohaut(이)가 1197년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Mohaut(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichole de Rising(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1217년 영국 랭카실르 뉴턴에서 Thurston de Banastre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecelia de Mohaut nasceu em 1197, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Mohaut, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Nichole de Rising, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thurston de Banastre em 1217, em Newton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1218, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 21 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecelia de Mohaut родилась в 1197 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Mohaut было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichole de Rising, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thurston de Banastre в 1217 г. в местности нютон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1218 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecelia de Mohaut nació en 1197, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Mohaut, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Nichole de Rising, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thurston de Banastre en 1217, en Newton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1218, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años.
